g.onclick: sendPrompt('Tell me more about the ImageCAS CCTA atlas dataset')
sendPrompt('Tell me more about the COCA non-contrast CT scans')
sendPrompt('Explain atlas preparation: resampling and HU windowing')
sendPrompt('Explain COCA scan preprocessing: clamping and shift-scale')
sendPrompt('Why is MOMENTS initialization needed instead of GEOMETRY mode?')
g.text: Align intensity mass centers · bridges Z-origin gap up to 450 mm

g.onclick: sendPrompt('Explain Stage 1: rigid registration with 6 DOF')
g.text: 6 DOF · Mattes MI · shrink [4,2,1] · 100 iter/level · LR 1.0

g.onclick: sendPrompt('Why is the atlas resampled to fixed image space between stages?')
g.text: sitk.Resample with rigid transform · preserves pixel type

g.onclick: sendPrompt('Explain Stage 2: affine registration with 12 DOF')
g.text: 12 DOF · Mattes MI · shrink [4,2,1] · 100 iter/level · LR 1.0

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How are the rigid and affine transforms composed?')
g.text: CompositeTransform(rigid ∘ affine) · applied once to atlas image and mask

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What is warped_atlas_seg.nii.gz used for in validation?')
sendPrompt('Explain the Euclidean Distance Transform validation method')
